name: Sklearn Gradient Boosting Classifier
description: Gradient Boosting Classifier builds an ensemble of decision trees in a stage-wise manner, optimizing a differentiable loss function for classification tasks including binary and multiclass problems.

fields.name: targetCol
fields.title: Target Column
fields.description: Target label column used for training the classifier.

fields.name: featureCols
fields.title: Feature Columns
fields.description: List of input feature columns containing numeric, boolean, or vector values.

fields.name: splitRatio
fields.title: Split Ratio
fields.description: Ratio used to split data into training and testing sets.

fields.name: loss
fields.title: Loss
fields.description: Loss function to be optimized. log_loss corresponds to logistic regression deviance, while exponential is used for AdaBoost-style boosting.

fields.name: learning_rate
fields.title: LearningRate
fields.description: Controls the contribution of each tree to the ensemble. Smaller values require more trees but can improve generalization.

fields.name: n_estimators
fields.title: NEstimators
fields.description: Number of boosting stages (trees) to be built.

fields.name: subsample
fields.title: Subsample
fields.description: Fraction of samples used to train each base learner. Values less than 1.0 introduce stochastic gradient boosting.

fields.name: criterion
fields.title: Criterion
fields.description: Metric used to evaluate the quality of a split when building trees.

fields.name: min_samples_split
fields.title: MinSamplesSplit
fields.description: Minimum number of samples required to split an internal node.

fields.name: min_samples_leaf
fields.title: MinSamplesLeaf
fields.description: Minimum number of samples required to be present at a leaf node.

fields.name: min_weight_fraction_leaf
fields.title: MinWeightFractionLeaf
fields.description: Minimum weighted fraction of samples required at a leaf node.

fields.name: max_depth
fields.title: MaxDepth
fields.description: Maximum depth of individual regression trees.

fields.name: min_impurity_decrease
fields.title: MinImpurityDecrease
fields.description: Minimum impurity reduction required for a node to be split.

fields.name: random_state
fields.title: RandomState
fields.description: Seed controlling randomness in data sampling and tree construction.

fields.name: verbose
fields.title: Verbose
fields.description: Controls verbosity of training output. Higher values print more training details.

fields.name: max_leaf_nodes
fields.title: MaxLeafNodes
fields.description: Maximum number of leaf nodes per tree. If empty, nodes are expanded until other stopping criteria are met.

fields.name: warm_start
fields.title: WarmStart
fields.description: Allows the model to reuse previously fitted trees and add more estimators.

fields.name: presort
fields.title: Presort
fields.description: Whether to presort data to speed up split finding. Deprecated in newer sklearn versions.

fields.name: validation_fraction
fields.title: ValidationFraction
fields.description: Proportion of training data reserved for early stopping when n_iter_no_change is set.

fields.name: n_iter_no_change
fields.title: NIterNoChange
fields.description: Stops training if validation score does not improve after this many iterations.

fields.name: tol
fields.title: Tol
fields.description: Tolerance for early stopping based on improvement threshold.

fields.name: output_confusion_matrix_chart
fields.title: Output Confusion Matrix Chart
fields.description: Whether to display the confusion matrix visualization.

fields.name: cm_chart_title
fields.title: Confusion Matrix Chart Title
fields.description: Title displayed above the confusion matrix chart.

fields.name: cm_chart_description
fields.value: Visual Representation of Predicted vs. Actual Classes
fields.title: Confusion Matrix Chart Description
fields.description: Description displayed along with the confusion matrix chart.

fields.name: confusionMatrixTargetLegend
fields.title: Confusion Matrix Target Legend
fields.description: Legend label representing actual class values.

fields.name: confusionMatrixPredictedLabelLegend
fields.title: Confusion Matrix PredictedLabel Legend
fields.description: Legend label representing predicted class values.

fields.name: confusionMatrixCountLegend
fields.title: Confusion Matrix Count Legend
fields.description: Legend label representing instance counts.

fields.name: path
fields.title: Save Confusion Matrix Path
fields.description: Filesystem path used to store the confusion matrix output.

fields.name: confusionMatrixRowDescription
fields.title: Confusion Matrix Outcome description
fields.description: Business-level interpretation of confusion matrix outcomes.

fields.name: output_roc_curve
fields.title: Output ROC Curve
fields.description: Whether to display ROC curve visualization.

fields.name: roc_title
fields.title: ROC Curve Chart Title
fields.description: Title displayed above the ROC curve chart.

fields.name: roc_description
fields.title: ROC Curve Chart Description
fields.description: Description shown along with the ROC curve chart.

fields.name: xlabel
fields.title: X Label
fields.description: Label for the X-axis of the ROC curve.

fields.name: ylabel
fields.title: Y Label
fields.description: Label for the Y-axis of the ROC curve.
